---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, node type, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or new tool.

**Why / use case**
What sysop task does it make easier?

**Scope hints (optional)**
- New node type/build? New MCP tool? Read-only or state-changing?
- If it changes node state, note that it must go through the confirm gate
  (see DESIGN.md → Authorization / safety model).

**Alternatives considered**
